speedscope-log-error-no-data: Attempted to log profile without data!
speedscope-log-error-request-bad-status: Request returned bad status code $1. Response: $2
speedscope-profile-previews-help: Add a checkbox to the editing interface that allows generating a flamegraph for a page preview.

speedscope-editpage-profile-notice: A speedscope profile for this preview can be viewed [$1 here].
